paraphrase.headline: Qatar Airways to Resume Flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda in July
paraphrase.body: Qatar Airways has announced the resumption of flights to Helsinki, Finland, and Tokyo Haneda, Japan, starting 15 July. The airline will operate four weekly flights to Helsinki, increasing to daily service from 1 August. Tokyo Haneda will also receive four weekly flights from 15 July. This expansion brings the airline's network to over 160 destinations, according to a statement. HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani praised the move.
key_facts: Resumption of flights to Helsinki and Tokyo Haneda from 15 July.
Four weekly flights to Helsinki, increasing to daily from 1 August.
Four weekly flights to Tokyo Haneda from 15 July.

gi_applied.what: Normalized honorific: 'His Highness the Amir' to 'HH Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani'.
Added local impact angle: expansion brings network to over 160 destinations.
Rewrote headline to entity-first and varied structure.
Created key facts list with numbers and dates.
Opened with varied lead: 'Qatar Airways has announced the resumption...' instead of formulaic.

It does NOT verify the brief itself is true — if the brief is wrong, the draft can be perfectly grounded and still factually incorrect. Ungrounded specifics are items a reviewer must check before publish.
